title: Norwegian Almond Pilaf
description: A creamy and nutty pilaf dish, inspired by Norwegian cuisine. Perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add pilaf rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
Add sliced almonds and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add sweet cream, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring to a simmer, reduce heat to low, and cover.
Cook for 15-20 minutes, or until liquid is absorbed and rice is tender.
Fluff with a fork and serve hot.
